2026-04-15T08:33:44.8699490Z description: |
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8700141Z   Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8767918Z   Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8776877Z   predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8792081Z   analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8793089Z   Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8793612Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8793760Z on:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8794088Z   issues:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8794438Z     types: [opened]
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8794832Z   workflow_dispatch:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8795215Z     inputs:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8795563Z       issue_number:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8797541Z         description: "Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)"
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8798882Z         required: true
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8799394Z         type: string
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8799773Z   roles: all
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8800132Z   reaction: eyes
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8801080Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8801540Z permissions: read-all
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8801809Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8801988Z network:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8802327Z   allowed:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8802670Z     - defaults
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8804156Z     - "api.nuget.org"
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8804460Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8804630Z safe-outputs:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8805014Z   report-failure-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8805514Z   add-labels:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8805925Z     max: 7
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8806365Z     target: "*"
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8806727Z   remove-labels:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8807079Z     max: 7
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8808190Z     target: "*"

2026-04-15T08:33:44.8808916Z     max: 2
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8809251Z     target: "*"

2026-04-15T08:33:44.8810000Z     max: 1
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8810919Z     target: "*"

2026-04-15T08:33:44.8812592Z     max: 1
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8812939Z     target: "*"
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8813292Z   noop:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8813674Z     report-as-issue: false
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8814096Z   jobs:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8814422Z     mention_owners:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8815401Z       description: "Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization"
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8816419Z       runs-on: ubuntu-latest
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8816888Z       output: "Owner mention comment posted"
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8817387Z       permissions:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8817756Z         issues: write
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8818129Z       inputs:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8818472Z         message:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8819016Z           description: "The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols"
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8819675Z           required: true
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8820088Z           type: string
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8820462Z         owners:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8821515Z           description: "Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')"
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8822763Z           required: true
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8823165Z           type: string
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8823651Z       steps:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8824696Z         - name: Post mention comment
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8825224Z           uses: actions/github-script@v9
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8825692Z           env:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8826229Z             DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: "${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}"
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8826876Z           with:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8827225Z             script: |
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8827618Z               const fs = require('fs');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8828867Z               const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8829294Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8829486Z               function resolveIssueNumber() {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8861641Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8862558Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8863089Z                 }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8863641Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8864383Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8864956Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8865392Z                 }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8865761Z                 return null;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8866175Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8866382Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8866606Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8867165Z               const owner = context.repo.owner;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8867699Z               const repo = context.repo.repo;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8868033Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8868211Z               if (issueNumber === null) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8869583Z                 core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8870959Z                 return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8881893Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8882560Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8882765Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8883381Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8883933Z                 try {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8884379Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8884987Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8885654Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8886149Z                   });
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8886715Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8887332Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8889130Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8890063Z                   });
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8890473Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8891125Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8902097Z                 }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8902533Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8903110Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8903328Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8903502Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8904035Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8904584Z                 return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8904965Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8905354Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8906010Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8906612Z                 return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8906986Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8907193Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8907361Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8907993Z               try {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8908542Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8909299Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8909950Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8910619Z                 return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8911001Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8946141Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8946495Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8947218Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8947789Z                 return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8948179Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8948402Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8948783Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8949489Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8950102Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8952636Z                 return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8953064Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8953273Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8953452Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8954147Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8954951Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8955559Z                   return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8955946Z                 }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8956165Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8956352Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8956846Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8957295Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8957763Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8958208Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8958701Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8959305Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8959998Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8960654Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8961129Z                   })
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8961765Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8962079Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8962264Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8962914Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8963535Z                   return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8963926Z                 }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8964135Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8964308Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8964865Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8965426Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8965746Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8965896Z                 try {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8966344Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8966983Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8967496Z                     body
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8967882Z                   });
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8968550Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8969323Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8969981Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8970647Z                   return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8971073Z                 }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8971841Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8972056Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8972196Z tools:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8972526Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8972862Z   github:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8973198Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8973922Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8975338Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8976210Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8976794Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8977048Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.8977210Z timeout-minutes: 10

2026-04-15T08:33:44.9017263Z                 if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9017988Z                   return context.issue.number;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9018461Z                 }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9018988Z                 const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9019710Z                 if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9020256Z                   return parsed;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9020727Z                 }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9021133Z                 return null;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9021734Z               }

2026-04-15T08:33:44.9022164Z               const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();

2026-04-15T08:33:44.9037985Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9038179Z               async function failSafe(reason) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9038761Z                 core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9039306Z                 try {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9039750Z                   await github.rest.issues.addLabels({
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9040336Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9040908Z                     labels: ['needs-team-triage']
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9041613Z                   });
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9042068Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9042653Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9043845Z                     body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9044778Z                   });
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9045194Z                 } catch (recoveryError) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9045822Z                   core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9046429Z                 }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9046809Z                 core.setFailed(reason);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9047265Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9047465Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9047638Z               if (!outputFile) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9048159Z                 await failSafe('No agent output path provided');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9048708Z                 return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9049087Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9049480Z               if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9050113Z                 await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9050724Z                 return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9051101Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9051499Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9051668Z               let agentOutput;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9052092Z               try {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9052768Z                 agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9053433Z               } catch (parseError) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9054204Z                 await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9054908Z                 return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9055334Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9055562Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9055857Z               if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9057037Z                 await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9057802Z                 return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9058616Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9058834Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9059200Z               const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9059895Z               if (items.length === 0) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9060479Z                 await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9061086Z                 return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9061674Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9061878Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9062069Z               for (const item of items) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9062750Z                 if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9063655Z                   await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9064259Z                   return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9064642Z                 }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9064850Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9065031Z                 const mentions = item.owners
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9065522Z                   .split(/[\s,]+/)
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9065975Z                   .map(s => s.trim())
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9066426Z                   .filter(Boolean)
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9066873Z                   .map(raw => {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9067363Z                     const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\?@/, '');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9067966Z                     if (/\r|\n/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9068647Z                     if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9069304Z                     return `@${normalized}`;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9069771Z                   })
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9070148Z                   .filter(Boolean);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9071887Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9072098Z                 if (mentions.length === 0) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9072800Z                   await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9073422Z                   return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9073816Z                 }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9074024Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9074204Z                 const body = item.message
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9074755Z                   ? `${item.message}\n\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9075316Z                   : mentions.join(' ');
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9075991Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9076160Z                 try {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9076621Z                   await github.rest.issues.createComment({
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9077216Z                     owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9077738Z                     body
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9078127Z                   });
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9078814Z                   core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9079583Z                 } catch (apiError) {
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9080238Z                   await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9080906Z                   return;
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9081485Z                 }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9081841Z               }
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9082049Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9082194Z tools:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9082522Z   web-fetch:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9082861Z   github:
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9083195Z     toolsets: [issues]
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9083700Z     # Triage must read issues from all users, including external
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9084556Z     # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9085258Z     # auto-applied "approved" policy filters them out via DIFC
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9085945Z     min-integrity: none
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9086190Z 
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9086351Z timeout-minutes: 10
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9086906Z [hash-debug] No template expressions (env./vars.) found in markdown body
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9087577Z [hash-debug] Canonical JSON (6762 chars):
2026-04-15T08:33:44.9122159Z {"frontmatter-text":"description: |\n  Intelligent issue triage assistant that processes new issues\n  Analyzes issue content, evaluates whether the author is a customer,\n  predicts labels, looks up owners from CODEOWNERS, and provides\n  analysis notes including debugging strategies and resource links\n  Implements the initial issue triage rules for the Azure SDK repository\n\non:\n  issues:\n    types: [opened]\n  workflow_dispatch:\n    inputs:\n      issue_number:\n        description: \"Issue number to triage (used when dispatched from another workflow)\"\n        required: true\n        type: string\n  roles: all\n  reaction: eyes\n\npermissions: read-all\n\nnetwork:\n  allowed:\n    - defaults\n    - \"api.nuget.org\"\n\nsafe-outputs:\n  report-failure-as-issue: false\n  add-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  remove-labels:\n    max: 7\n    target: \"*\"\n  add-comment:\n    max: 2\n    target: \"*\"\n  assign-to-user:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  close-issue:\n    max: 1\n    target: \"*\"\n  noop:\n    report-as-issue: false\n  jobs:\n    mention_owners:\n      description: \"Post a routing comment @mentioning team owners on the triggering issue; bypasses safe-outputs mention neutralization\"\n      runs-on: ubuntu-latest\n      output: \"Owner mention comment posted\"\n      permissions:\n        issues: write\n      inputs:\n        message:\n          description: \"The comment body text without any @mentions or @ symbols\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n        owners:\n          description: \"Comma-separated GitHub usernames to notify, without the @ prefix (e.g. 'user1, user2, Azure/team-name')\"\n          required: true\n          type: string\n      steps:\n        - name: Post mention comment\n          uses: actions/github-script@v9\n          env:\n            DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER: \"${{ github.event.inputs.issue_number || '' }}\"\n          with:\n            script: |\n              const fs = require('fs');\n              const outputFile = process.env.GH_AW_AGENT_OUTPUT;\n\n              function resolveIssueNumber() {\n                if (Number.isInteger(context.issue?.number) && context.issue.number > 0) {\n                  return context.issue.number;\n                }\n                const parsed = parseInt(process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER, 10);\n                if (Number.isInteger(parsed) && parsed > 0) {\n                  return parsed;\n                }\n                return null;\n              }\n\n              const issueNumber = resolveIssueNumber();\n              const owner = context.repo.owner;\n              const repo = context.repo.repo;\n\n              if (issueNumber === null) {\n                core.setFailed(`Unable to determine a valid issue number. context.issue.number=${context.issue?.number ?? 'undefined'}, DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER=${process.env.DISPATCH_ISSUE_NUMBER ?? 'undefined'}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              async function failSafe(reason) {\n                core.error(`mention_owners failed: ${reason}`);\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.addLabels({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    labels: ['needs-team-triage']\n                  });\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body: '⚠️ Automated triage was unable to complete owner notification for this issue. Routing for manual triage'\n                  });\n                } catch (recoveryError) {\n                  core.error(`Recovery also failed: ${recoveryError.message}`);\n                }\n                core.setFailed(reason);\n              }\n\n              if (!outputFile) {\n                await failSafe('No agent output path provided');\n                return;\n              }\n              if (!fs.existsSync(outputFile)) {\n                await failSafe(`Agent output file not found: ${outputFile}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              let agentOutput;\n              try {\n                agentOutput = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(outputFile, 'utf8'));\n              } catch (parseError) {\n                await failSafe(`Failed to parse agent output: ${parseError.message}`);\n                return;\n              }\n\n              if (!agentOutput || !Array.isArray(agentOutput.items)) {\n                await failSafe('Agent output missing items array');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              const items = agentOutput.items.filter(i => i.type === 'mention_owners');\n              if (items.length === 0) {\n                await failSafe('No mention_owners items in agent output');\n                return;\n              }\n\n              for (const item of items) {\n                if (!item.owners || typeof item.owners !== 'string' || !item.owners.trim()) {\n                  await failSafe('mention_owners item missing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const mentions = item.owners\n                  .split(/[\\s,]+/)\n                  .map(s => s.trim())\n                  .filter(Boolean)\n                  .map(raw => {\n                    const normalized = raw.replace(/^\\\\?@/, '');\n                    if (/\\r|\\n/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    if (!/^[A-Za-z0-9-]+(?:\\/[A-Za-z0-9-]+)?$/.test(normalized)) return null;\n                    return `@${normalized}`;\n                  })\n                  .filter(Boolean);\n\n                if (mentions.length === 0) {\n                  await failSafe('No valid owners after parsing owners field');\n                  return;\n                }\n\n                const body = item.message\n                  ? `${item.message}\\n\\n//cc: ${mentions.join(' ')}`\n                  : mentions.join(' ');\n\n                try {\n                  await github.rest.issues.createComment({\n                    owner, repo, issue_number: issueNumber,\n                    body\n                  });\n                  core.info(`Posted routing comment on #${issueNumber} mentioning: ${mentions.join(', ')}`);\n                } catch (apiError) {\n                  await failSafe(`GitHub API error posting comment: ${apiError.message}`);\n                  return;\n                }\n              }\n\ntools:\n  web-fetch:\n  github:\n    toolsets: [issues]\n    # Triage must read issues from all users, including external\n    # customers with NONE author_association; without this, the\n    # auto-applied \"approved\" policy filters them out via DIFC\n    min-integrity: none\n\ntimeout-minutes: 10"}
